title: Is the new Premier League ball behind all the long-range goals? We asked a scientist
summary: The Premier League changed its match ball this season, and while teams are attempting fewer long-range shots overall, they continue to score impressive goals from distance. Scientists are examining whether the new ball design is responsible for this paradoxical pattern of goal-scoring success.
content: Teams aren't taking as many long-range shots this season, but they're still scoring stunning goals from distance. Is a change in the Premier League match ball responsible?

zh.title: 新英超联赛球是否导致了所有远射进球？我们问了一位科学家
zh.summary: 英超联赛本赛季更换了比赛用球，虽然球队远距离射门次数总体减少，但他们继续从远距离打入令人印象深刻的进球。科学家们正在研究新球的设计是否导致了这种矛盾的进球成功模式。

title: Why Guardiola's legacy could exceed the likes of Ferguson, Wenger, Klopp
summary: Pep Guardiola has a unique opportunity to surpass legendary managers like Sir Alex Ferguson and Jürgen Klopp by achieving both their legacies simultaneously. His potential to exit as a champion while building a strong foundation would establish him among football's greatest managers.
content: Exit as a Premier League champion like Sir Alex Ferguson? Or leave behind a strong foundation like Jurgen Klopp? Pep Guardiola has the chance to do both.

zh.title: 为什么瓜迪奥拉的遗产可能超越弗格森、温格、克洛普等人
zh.summary: 佩普·瓜迪奥拉有独特机会通过同时实现弗格森爵士和克洛普等传奇教练的遗产来超越他们。他作为冠军离开同时建立强大基础的潜力将使他成为足球历史上最伟大的教练之一。

title: Dos Santos signs first contract after bar fire
summary: Metz defender Tahirys dos Santos has signed her first contract after surviving a devastating Swiss bar fire on New Year's Eve that killed 41 people. Santos says the tragedy has strengthened her resolve and determination.
content: Metz defender Tahirys dos Santos, who survived a Swiss bar fire on New Year's Eve that killed 41 people, says "this ordeal made me stronger".

zh.title: 多斯桑托斯在酒吧火灾后签署首份合同
zh.summary: 梅茨后卫塔希里斯·多斯桑托斯在旧年除夕幸存一场导致41人丧生的毁灭性瑞士酒吧火灾后签署了她的首份合同。桑托斯表示这场悲剧增强了她的决心和决定。

title: Barcelona have gone backwards; Real Madrid set for barren year. How can they be fixed?
summary: Barcelona and Real Madrid's early Champions League exits have exposed clear tactical deficiencies for both Spanish clubs to address. These painful eliminations paradoxically provide a roadmap for meaningful improvement going forward.
content: The pain of early Champions League exits might actually work in Barcelona's and Real Madrid's favor: It's now clear for all to see where their deficiencies are.

zh.title: 巴塞罗那陷入衰退；皇马将面临无获之年。他们如何才能振兴？
zh.summary: 巴塞罗那和皇马的欧冠早期出局暴露了两支西班牙球队存在的明显战术缺陷。这些痛苦的淘汰赛成绩反而为未来的有意义改进提供了路线图。

title: Arsenal forward Blackstenius signs new contract
summary: Arsenal women's forward Stina Blackstenius has committed to the club by signing a new two-year contract. The contract extension signals her continued importance to Arsenal's Women's Super League squad.
content: Arsenal forward Stina Blackstenius signs a new two-year contract with the Women's Super League club.

zh.title: 阿森纳前锋布拉克施坦尼乌斯签署新合同
zh.summary: 阿森纳女队前锋斯蒂娜·布拉克施坦尼乌斯通过签署新的两年合同向俱乐部表明了承诺。这份合同延期表明她对阿森纳女超联赛球队的持续重要性。

title: Bonucci on Italy coach: Pep 'right man for the job'
summary: Leonardo Bonucci, a Juventus and Italy legend, backs Pep Guardiola as the right choice to lead Italy's national team through necessary transformation. Bonucci believes Guardiola's tactical expertise is crucial for addressing the national squad's current struggles.
content: Former Italy and Juventus great Leonardo Bonucci wants Pep Guardiola to lead a "radical change" in the national team.

zh.title: 博努奇评意大利教练：瓜迪奥拉"最适合这份工作"
zh.summary: 尤文图斯和意大利传奇人物莱昂纳多·博努奇支持佩普·瓜迪奥拉作为领导意大利国家队进行必要转型的正确选择。博努奇相信瓜迪奥拉的战术专业知识对于解决国家队目前的困难至关重要。

title: Brady steps down as West Ham chief after 16yrs
summary: Baroness Karren Brady has ended her 16-year tenure as vice-chair of West Ham United. Her departure marks the conclusion of a significant era in her involvement with the Premier League club.
content: Baroness Karren Brady has stepped down from her position as vice-chair of West Ham United after 16 years at the club.

zh.title: 布拉迪在任16年后辞去西汉姆主席职位
zh.summary: 卡琳·布拉迪女爵在西汉姆联队担任副主席16年后已结束其任期。她的离任标志着她与这家英超俱乐部长期参与历史的结束。

title: 'Every kid's dream' - third-choice keeper Woodman on life at Liverpool
summary: Liverpool's Freddie Woodman, the third-choice goalkeeper, discusses the demanding experience of serving as a backup keeper and his unexpected opportunity in the Merseyside derby. For Woodman, being called upon represents both a professional challenge and a lifelong dream.
content: Liverpool's Freddie Woodman on the "tough" life of a third-choice goalkeeper and what it was like being thrown in "at the deep end" in the Merseyside derby.

zh.title: "每个孩子的梦想"——利物浦第三门神伍德曼谈职业生涯
zh.summary: 利物浦第三门神弗雷迪·伍德曼讨论了担任替补门神的艰巨任务,以及他在默西塞德郡德比中的意外机会。对伍德曼来说,被征召代表了职业挑战与终身梦想的结合。

title: Cardiff youngsters among Europe's best - Barry-Murphy
summary: New Cardiff City manager Brian Barry-Murphy cites the club's exceptional young talent—which he ranks among Europe's best—as a key factor in accepting the position. Barry-Murphy views Cardiff's youth development as a strong foundation for future success.
content: Brian Barry-Murphy says Cardiff City's young players, whom he ranks among the best in Europe, were key to his decision to join the Bluebirds.

zh.title: 卡迪夫年轻球员跻身欧洲顶级——巴里-墨菲
zh.summary: 卡迪夫城队新主帅布莱恩·巴里-墨菲表示,球队杰出的年轻天才是其接受职位的关键因素,并认为这些球员的水平在欧洲名列前茅。巴里-墨菲将卡迪夫的青年培养视为未来成功的坚实基础。

title: Sutton's predictions - midweek games including Burnley v Man City
summary: BBC football analyst Chris Sutton, BBC readers, and an AI model provide predictions for this week's midweek Premier League fixtures, including Burnley versus Manchester City. The forecasts showcase different analytical methodologies for predicting match outcomes.
content: Chris Sutton, the BBC readers and AI make predictions for this week's Premier League fixtures on Tuesday and Wednesday.

zh.title: 萨顿的预测 - 中周比赛，包括伯恩利对曼城
zh.summary: BBC足球分析师克里斯·萨顿、BBC读者和人工智能模型为本周中周英超联赛比赛提供预测，包括伯恩利对曼城。这些预测展示了预测比赛结果的不同分析方法。

title: Brady steps down as West Ham vice-chair
summary: Baroness Karren Brady has stepped down as vice-chair of Premier League side West Ham United after 16 years in the role. Brady's departure represents the end of a significant period in her involvement with club leadership.
content: Baroness Karren Brady steps down as vice-chair of Premier League side West Ham after 16 years.

zh.title: 布雷迪卸任西汉姆联副主席
zh.summary: 女爵士卡伦·布雷迪在担任英超球队西汉姆联副主席16年后卸任。布雷迪的离任标志着她在俱乐部领导中的重要时期的结束。

title: Can Arsenal's season be compared to McIlroy's 2025 Masters?
summary: The Monday Night Club debate examines whether Arsenal's season can be compared to golfer Rory McIlroy's 2025 Masters performance. The discussion explores whether similar narrative arcs apply across football and golf in overcoming adversity.
content: The Monday Night Club debate whether Arsenal's season is comparable to McIlroy's 2025 Masters.

zh.title: 阿森纳的赛季能与麦克罗伊的2025年名人赛相比较吗？
zh.summary: 周一夜间俱乐部的辩论讨论了阿森纳赛季是否可以与高尔夫球手罗里·麦克罗伊的2025年名人赛表现相比较。讨论探讨了足球和高尔夫中是否存在类似的叙事弧线来克服逆境。

title: Who is Iraola successor Rose?
summary: German football journalist Constantin Eckner profiles Marco Rose, Bournemouth's incoming head coach who replaces Andoni Iraola. Eckner provides background on Rose's managerial experience and credentials for the role.
content: German football journalist Constantin Eckner provides the background on Bournemouth's incoming head coach Marco Rose.

zh.title: 伊劳拉的继任者罗斯是谁？
zh.summary: 德国足球记者康斯坦丁·埃克纳专访马尔科·罗斯，这位伯恩茅斯的新任主教练将接替安东尼·伊劳拉。埃克纳介绍了罗斯的执教经验和胜任这个职位的资格。

title: Fife pubs can open late to screen certain World Cup matches
summary: Fife's licensing board has granted extended opening hours for pubs screening World Cup matches involving Scotland or England. Venues will be permitted to remain open until 30 minutes after these specific international matches conclude.
content: The licensing board said venues will be able to stay open until half an hour after games featuring Scotland or England.

zh.title: 苏格兰菲夫郡酒吧可开放至深夜以转播特定世界杯比赛
zh.summary: 苏格兰菲夫郡许可证委员会批准酒吧延长营业时间以转播涉及苏格兰或英格兰的世界杯比赛。场馆可在这些特定国际比赛结束后的30分钟内继续营业。

title: Tired England play with fear - ex-manager Capello
summary: Former England manager Fabio Capello warns that Thomas Tuchel must address the national team's tendency to "play with fear" if they hope to win the World Cup this summer. Capello's assessment suggests England's mental approach is as critical as tactical preparation for tournament success.
content: Thomas Tuchel must address England's tendency to "play with fear" if they are to win the World Cup this summer, says former boss Fabio Capello.

zh.title: 疲惫的英格兰队带着恐惧而战——前主教练卡佩罗评
zh.summary: 前英格兰主教练法比奥·卡佩罗警告说，如果英格兰队希望赢得今年夏天的世界杯，托马斯·图赫尔必须解决球队"带着恐惧而战"的倾向。卡佩罗的评估表明，英格兰队的心理状态与战术准备对赛事成功同样至关重要。

title: Why stakes are so high in England's hottest title race
summary: English football's most competitive title race carries significant consequences for the teams involved. The stakes are high as multiple clubs battle for the championship, captivating fans with its unpredictable nature and importance for each team's future.
content: BBC Sport explores the hottest title race in English football, and examines why the consequences are so big for the teams involved.

zh.title: 为什么英格兰最激烈的争冠战中赌注如此之高
zh.summary: 英格兰足球最具竞争力的争冠战对参赛队伍产生重大影响。随着多支球队争夺冠军，赌注很高，其不可预测的性质和对每支球队未来的重要性吸引了粉丝。

title: Arsenal lead pursuit of Rangers' Fernandez - gossip
summary: Emmanuel Fernandez, a striker linked with English clubs including Arsenal, has attracted attention from top teams seeking attacking reinforcements. Aberdeen's manager has backed Fernandez for Scotland squad selection, suggesting the transfer could be significant in the Premier League market.
content: Emmanuel Fernandez linked with English clubs as Aberdeen boss backs striker for Scotland squad.

zh.title: 阿森纳领导追求流浪者队费尔南德斯 - 绯闻
zh.summary: 与阿森纳等英格兰俱乐部有关联的前锋埃马努埃尔·费尔南德斯吸引了寻求进攻支援的顶级球队的关注。阿伯丁队的经理支持费尔南德斯入选苏格兰队，这表明这笔转会可能对英超市场产生重大影响。

title: Quiz: Name every team to have been relegated from the Premier League
summary: An interactive quiz challenges football fans to name all 43 teams that have been relegated from the Premier League, including Wolves. The quiz tests deeper knowledge of English football's history and the clubs that have dropped out of the top division.
content: Wolves are one of 43 teams to have been relegated from the Premier League, can you name them all?

zh.title: 测验：说出所有从英超降级的球队
zh.summary: 一个互动测验挑战足球迷指出所有从英超降级的43支球队，包括狼队。该测验测试了对英格兰足球历史和从顶级联赛中脱落的俱乐部的更深入了解。

title: Ranking the most successful world record transfers of the past 50 years
summary: The article ranks the top 10 world record transfer signings over the past five decades, examining which expensive players justified their record fees with on-field success. Not all record signings deliver results, but many of football's greatest players have commanded world record prices.
content: Stumping up world record sums doesn't always guarantee success, but plenty of football's most expensive players have delivered on their hefty fees -  here are the top 10.

zh.title: 过去50年最成功的世界纪录转会排名
zh.summary: 本文排列了过去五十年间十笔最成功的世界纪录转会签约，审视哪些高价球员用场上表现证明了他们创纪录的转会费。并非所有纪录签约都能带来成功，但许多足球伟大球员都曾创造过世界纪录转会费。

title: Wolves relegated from EPL with 5 games to play
summary: Wolverhampton Wanderers have been officially relegated from the Premier League after winning just three games in their first 33 matches of the season. Their demotion was confirmed with five games still remaining on the fixture list. This marks the end of their top-flight tenure following a season of consistent struggles.
content: Wolverhampton Wanderers have officially been relegated from the Premier League.

zh.title: 狼队还有5场比赛就从英超降级
zh.summary: 沃尔夫汉普顿流浪者队在本赛季前33场比赛中仅赢3场后，官方确认从英超降级。他们的降级已经确定，赛程表上还剩5场比赛。这标志着他们在经历一个充满困难的赛季后，顶级联赛生涯的结束。

title: Matarazzo: Sociedad Copa title 'just the beginning'
summary: Real Sociedad won the Copa del Rey, their first major trophy since 2021, bringing jubilation to their home region. Over 100,000 supporters gathered in San Sebastian, Spain to celebrate the squad's achievement. Manager Matarazzo views the victory as just the start of greater successes ahead for the club.
content: More than 100,000 fans gathered in the streets of San Sebastian, Spain, on Monday to celebrate Real Sociedad's Copa del Rey win over the weekend -- a first major trophy for the Basque team since 2021.

zh.title: 马塔拉佐：皇家社会杯赛冠军"只是开始"
zh.summary: 皇家社会赢得了国王杯冠军，这是他们自2021年以来首次获得重大奖杯，为家乡地区带来了欢乐。超过10万名球迷在西班牙圣塞巴斯蒂安聚集庆祝球队的成就。主教练马塔拉佐将这场胜利视为俱乐部未来更大成功的开始。

title: Toney puts Al Ahli in AFC Champions League final
summary: Al Ahli advanced to the AFC Champions League Elite final as defending champions following a 2-1 victory over Vissel Kobe of Japan on Monday. Ivan Toney scored the decisive second-half goal that secured the win. The Saudi Arabian club's triumph continues their strong form in the Asian club football competition.
content: Defending champion Al Ahli reached the final of the AFC Champions League Elite after Ivan Toney's second-half goal beat Vissel Kobe of Japan 2-1 on Monday.

zh.title: 托尼助阿赫利进入亚冠联赛决赛
zh.summary: 阿赫利作为卫冕冠军，以2-1战胜日本球队浦和红钻队，晋级亚冠精英赛决赛。伊万·托尼打进了确保胜利的下半场关键球。这支沙特阿拉伯俱乐部的胜利延续了他们在亚洲俱乐部足球竞技中的出色表现。

title: Madrid beat Brugge to win UEFA Youth League
summary: Real Madrid's youth side won the UEFA Youth League on Monday, securing at least one European trophy for the club this season. The victory at the youth level continues the organization's tradition of success across all competitive levels. This championship reinforces Madrid's development system and youth academy effectiveness.
content: Real Madrid has earned at least one trophy this season and become a European champion again on Monday.

zh.title: 马德里击败布鲁日赢得欧洲青年联赛冠军
zh.summary: 皇家马德里青年队在周一赢得欧洲青年联赛冠军，确保了俱乐部本赛季至少获得一项欧洲冠军。这次青年级别的胜利延续了该组织在所有竞技水平上的成功传统。这个冠军强化了马德里的发展体系和青年学院的有效性。

title: Philly offering fans free transit after WC games
summary: Philadelphia will provide free train travel to fans departing from World Cup matches this summer as a fan-friendly initiative. The local organizing committee officially confirmed the transportation policy to enhance accessibility for tournament attendees. This measure aims to improve the overall fan experience and ease departure logistics from venues.
content: Philadelphia will offer free train travel to fans leaving World Cup matches this summer, the local organizing committee has confirmed.

zh.title: 费城在世界杯比赛后为球迷提供免费交通
zh.summary: 费城将在今年夏天为离开世界杯比赛的球迷提供免费列车旅行，作为一项球迷友好的举措。当地组织委员会正式确认了这一交通政策，以增强赛事参加者的可达性。此措施旨在改善整体球迷体验，并简化场馆出发物流。

title: ⚽ USWNT lessons learned ahead of World Cup
summary: After completing three friendly matches against Japan, US Women's National Team coach Emma Hayes assesses lessons learned as the team prepares for the World Cup. The friendlies provided valuable preparation time that will shape the USWNT's final tournament preparations.
content: The USWNT just wrapped its window of three friendly games against Japan, but what did Emma Hayes learn ahead of the World Cup?

zh.title: ⚽ 美国女足在世界杯前的经验教训
zh.summary: 在完成三场与日本的友谊赛后，美国女足国家队教练埃玛·海斯评估了球队为世界杯做准备时学到的经验。这些友谊赛提供了宝贵的备战时间，将塑造美国女足的最终锦标赛准备。
